THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAY, CARL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOSCHETTI, BARBARA ANN $3,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
